name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or epic for this project
title: 'Epic: '
labels: epic, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Request Process

Thank you for proposing a new feature! Larger features are tracked as **epics**, which our automation
breaks down into sub-tasks (Requirements Analysis, Design and Architecture, Implementation, Testing
and Documentation) automatically.

### Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. e.g. "I'm always frustrated when [...]".

### Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### User Stories / Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] As a user, I want ...
- [ ] As a maintainer, I want ...

### Scope of the Epic
Briefly describe the scope. The automation will create the following sub-tasks:
1. Requirements Analysis
2. Design and Architecture
3. Implementation
4. Testing and Documentation

### Priority
Please indicate priority by including one of: `critical`, `urgent`, `production`, `outage`,
`important`, `high`, `blocking`, `medium`, `normal`, `low`, `nice-to-have`, `minor` in the title or body
so the automation can label it correctly.

### Additional context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
